eadler      2011-12-25 07:34:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math/jlatexmath      Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  - update to 0.9.7
  
  Changes:
  * Add the TeX macros: \above and \abovewithdelims.
  * Add an option in jlmDynamic ([i]) to give the possibility to insert a group as if it was not a group.
  * Fix various bugs
  
  PR:             ports/163596
  Submitted by:   Rob Farmer <rfarmer@predatorlabs.net> (maintainer)
  Feature safe:   yes
